creator: joeb1@a1poweruser.com
text:
I cannot duplicate this "su -m xxxx command" problem on my 10.0-RELEASE-p3 system. 
I would say this problem is more about the way you have created your jail and user accounts than a problem with the su command.

Please provide details about how you created your jail and the user accounts in that jail that you are trying to use the su command on.
